IF YOU ARE NOT AGREEING TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY, PLEASE DO NOT INSTALL, USE OR OTHERWISE ACCESS OUR APPLICATIONS.

decoder_heading: Protecting your privacy is important to us
ident_heading: Protecting your privacy is important to us
heading_content_part: Protecting your privacy is important to us. We have the latest statement that will help you to understand how we deals with the personal information.

decoder_heading: We do not collect any PII (Personal Identifiable Information)
ident_heading: We do not collect any PII (Personal Identifiable Information)
heading_content_part: We do not collect any PII (Personal Identifiable Information) from you when you download our applications. To be specific, we do not require the consumers to get registered before downloading the application, nor do we keep track of the consumer’s visits of our application and we do not have a Server to store such PII.

decoder_heading: We will never use such information
ident_heading: We will never use such information
heading_content_part: We will never use such information (e.g. your name and email address) for any other purposes, such as to further market our products, or to disclose your personal information to a third party.It should be noted that whether or not to send us your feedback or bug report is a completely voluntary initiative upon your own decision.We are committed to protecting the privacy of all visitors, users and others who access our application (“you,” or “Users”).

decoder_heading: The images you take using camera, or if you use any image from gallery
ident_heading: The images you take using camera, or if you use any image from gallery
heading_content_part: The images you take using camera, or if you use any image from gallery, will remain inside the app only, we do not have access to any of your images.

decoder_heading: Any audio or video you record inside the application
ident_heading: Any audio or video you record inside the application
heading_content_part: Any audio or video you record inside the application will not be saved anywhere from our side.

decoder_heading: We uses Airpush and StartApp as ads provider
ident_heading: We uses Airpush and StartApp as ads provider
heading_content_part: We uses Airpush and StartApp as ads provider. Airpush and StartApp wants to show ads that are relevant to you. For more information, please checkhttp://www.airpush.com/privacypolicy/andhttp://www.startapp.com/policy/sdk-policy/

decoder_heading: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy
ident_heading: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, the practices of this site, or your dealings with this site, please contact us at: pinnaclehelp@yahoo.comPinnacle LabsStart a Blog at WordPress.com.
